name: Dusky Catalyst
description: Notes When shooting In Combat, this wand reduces your Wisdom by 10. This is effectively a -5 WIS reduction as the wand gives +5 WIS. Regardless, it may be enough to ruin the wismod scaling on certain abilities, especially on Priest and Sorcerer. However, the 5% mana cost reduction is usually worth the WIS reduction.
effects: Reduces the Magic casting cost of your Ability by 5% Shots hit multiple targets Wavy shots
On Shoot: When in combat, WIS Decrease (-10 WIS) for 1 second.
